product_events.title: Styx Behavioral Market — First Full Pipeline Traversal
product_events.description: Styx is the first product to traverse the full I→II→III→IV→V→VI→VII organ chain. Behavioral economics theory (ORGAN-I) feeds artistic visualization (ORGAN-II) which informs the peer-audited accountability platform (ORGAN-III). Community discussion on the behavioral economics thesis and design philosophy.

product_events.title: Behavioral Economics for Accountability Systems
product_events.description: Reading group exploring loss aversion, prospect theory, and game-theoretic accountability proofs as applied in the Styx platform. Source material from styx-behavioral-economics-theory.

product_events.title: UCC-MCA Intelligence Platform — Community Launch
product_events.description: Community launch for the flagship UCC-MCA Intelligence Platform. AI-powered lead generation for Merchant Cash Advance providers through UCC filing analysis.

product_events.title: Inverted Interview CV — Community Launch
product_events.description: Community launch for Inverted Interview CV. A hexagonal-architecture CV system where the job interviews you.

product_events.title: Classroom RPG Aetheria — Community Launch
product_events.description: Community launch for Classroom RPG Aetheria. Fantasy-themed classroom gamification across four worlds.

product_events.title: The Actual News — Community Launch
product_events.description: Community launch for The Actual News, a news platform built on transparency and factual reporting.
